title: Phase II Immunotherapy Study for Metastatic NSCLC
key_inclusion: Documented CNS metastasis status within 28 days
performance: Patients should be fit enough for systemic immunotherapy and study follow-up
Primary endpoint focuses on response and disease control in metastatic NSCLC
imaging_context: Recent CNS imaging or documented brain metastasis assessment is required
Disease burden should be documented with current restaging imaging before enrollment
exclusions: Prior PD-1 or PD-L1 inhibitor therapy
Uncontrolled autoimmune disease requiring systemic therapy

inclusion_criteria.text: Documented CNS metastasis status within 28 days

exclusion_criteria.text: No prior PD-1 or PD-L1 inhibitor therapy
No uncontrolled autoimmune disease requiring systemic therapy

title: Targeted Therapy Trial for Metastatic Breast Cancer
key_inclusion: Metastatic breast cancer with HER2-low disease
Performance status appropriate for targeted therapy
performance: Patients should be clinically stable enough for combination targeted therapy
Primary study focus includes safety and antitumor activity
imaging_context: Current metastatic disease documentation should be available
Baseline measurable disease by RECIST 1.1 is preferred for response assessment
exclusions: Reduced left ventricular ejection fraction or other major cardiac safety concern

inclusion_criteria.text: Metastatic breast cancer with HER2-low disease

title: Cell Therapy Study in Relapsed Hematologic Malignancy
key_inclusion: Relapsed or refractory disease after standard therapy
Clinical status appropriate for intensive cell therapy evaluation
performance: Patients should be stable enough for cell therapy workup and monitoring
Early-phase study emphasizes feasibility and safety
imaging_context: Disease status should be documented with current marrow, blood, or imaging assessment as applicable
Active disease context should be clearly described before treatment planning

inclusion_criteria.text: Relapsed or refractory disease after standard therapy
